name: Mental Math Madness
short_description: An educational casual game designed to improve mental math skills. Before you are hordes of math equations that require rapid solving and shooting, all while dodging incoming projectiles. Gather gold to upgrade your lives and take on increasingly challenging levels and topics.
detailed_description:
Mental Math Madness is a casual educational game where the goal is to quickly solve and shoot down enemy math equations as they appear by typing the correct answers, all while avoiding their projectiles.

Topics
  • Levels 1, 2, 3: Addition, Subtraction, Multiplication
  • Levels 4, 5, 6: Division, Exponents, Square Roots
  • Level 7, 8, 9: Algebra
  • Level 10, 11, 12: Differentiation

The game features a gold and life upgrade system to make subsequent runs easier.

Controls
  • A, D or ← → to strafe horizontally
  • W or ↑ to shoot
  • A numpad is recommended for answering equations
